name: Changshu Fengfan Power Equipment Co., Ltd.
summary: Changshu Fengfan Power Equipment Co., Ltd. engages in the production and sale of angle steel towers, steel pipe composite towers, pipelines, substation structural supports, steel pipe poles, steel structure parts, and other products in China. It is also involved in the sale of fuel oil and asphalt; metal products; raw materials for textiles and knitwear; chemical products; and non-ferrous metals. In addition, the company engages in the provision of mergers and acquisitions, corporate assets reorganizations, asset management, and investment management services; management consulting, marketing planning, market information consulting, and planning services. The company also exports its products to Australia, Algeria, Bangladesh, Pakistan, Poland, Iran, Iraq, South Korea, Myanmar, Tajikistan, Africa, Congo, Peru, Chile, Equatorial Guinea, etc. Changshu Fengfan Power Equipment Co., Ltd. was founded in 1993 and is based in Changshu, China.
